parsed.recommendation_text: For office work, the JBL Tune 770NC offers a solid balance of features and affordability. With basic noise cancellation, it's suitable for reducing ambient noise in an office setting. Its 44-hour battery life ensures all-day use without needing to recharge. The punchy sound signature is well-suited for long hours of work, providing clear audio for calls and meetings. At $79.95, it fits within the budget while offering a comfortable over-ear design with multipoint connectivity.
parsed.selection_rationale: Best value for office use; affordable price point.
